passport.label: Passport number
passport.help: Printed on the photo page of your passport. Letters and numbers only.

errors.tooShort: Passport number too short — min 6 characters
errors.tooLong: Passport number too long — max 12 characters
errors.invalidChars: Letters and numbers only — no spaces or symbols

given_name.label: Given name (Nombre)
given_name.help: Exactly as shown on your passport (Latin letters only)

errors.invalidChars: Use the Latin spelling from your passport — no accents

family_name.label: Family name (Apellidos)
family_name.help: Exactly as shown on your passport (Latin letters only)

errors.invalidChars: Use the Latin spelling from your passport — no accents

nationality.label: Nationality
nationality.help: ISO 3-letter country code of the country that issued your passport

errors.invalidFormat: Use the 3-letter code (e.g. USA, CAN, GBR, FRA)

errors.tooEarly: Date of birth seems too far in the past — double check
errors.tooLate: Date of birth cannot be in the future

arrival_date.label: Arrival date
arrival_date.help: Format: YYYY-MM-DD — the date you enter Mexico

errors.tooEarly: FMM-E is typically filed within 30 days of arrival
errors.tooLate: Arrival date seems too far in the future

entry_point.label: Port of entry
entry_point.help: Airport or land crossing where you enter Mexico. Use the IATA code for airports.

trip_purpose.label: Purpose of trip
trip_purpose.help: Tourism, business, transit, study, or other

destination_address.label: Address in Mexico
destination_address.help: Where you will stay. Hotel name and city is enough for tourism.

email.label: Email
email.help: Your FMM PDF and reference number are sent here.
